name: Stock List Matrix
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can view inventory levels in a matrix format showing products by size, color, or variant by accessing the Stock List Matrix, which presents stock data in an easy-to-scan grid layout. This visual inventory presentation helps retail operators quickly identify stock gaps, assess variant representation, and make reordering decisions based on comprehensive variant-level inventory visibility."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the Stock List Matrix helps retail operators efficiently review multi-variant product inventory, identify missing sizes or colors needing reorder, and ensure balanced stock representation across product variations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Like the Stock List, the Stock List Matrix is a list of products that displays a separate line per style, and includes a grid displaying the stock level and price of each size/colour combination."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Because of this, the Stock List Matrix only displays products that have a Style Code (Manufacturer SKU), a Size and a Colour."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This article applies to the following menu options:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reports > Stock Reports > Stock List Matrix", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Filters"}], "data-id": "filters"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphcpEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphcpEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "bd8997c9a3870f958e01dd4ee70f8bcfc0f66a3d47e999b36dccdace7ed53e34.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Product PLU Code:"}], "data-id": "product-plu-code"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can enter any PLU code (Product Look Up), which include ProductID, SupplierSKU and ManufacturerSKU, in here."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For ProductID or SupplierSKU, this will return a single product, however you can use a ManufacturerSKU to return a list of all products in a style code group."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please note that the PLU code works in conjunction with the other search options, not separately from them."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "For example, if you chose the "Books" product type and then entered a PLU of a product in the "Accessories" product type, the search will return no results."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Outlet:"}], "data-id": "outlet"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You have to choose a single outlet at a time. This report will default to the first (alphabetically sorted) Outlet."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Product Type:"}], "data-id": "product-type"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can choose one or more Product Types at a time using the mouse pointer and a combination of the Ctrl and Shift buttons on your Keyboard, or simply leave the "All" option chosen to include all Product Types in the results."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Supplier:"}], "data-id": "supplier"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Like with Product Types, you can choose one or more Suppliers at a time using the mouse pointer and a combination of the Ctrl and Shift buttons on your Keyboard, or simply leave the "All" option chosen to include all Product Types in the results."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Attributes:"}], "data-id": "attributes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can narrow the results of your search down further by choosing specific Sizes, Colours, Seasons and/or Brands."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As this report only includes products that have a size and colour, you "}, {"text": "must", "bold": true}, {"text": " choose all sizes/colours that you want to include in the results."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Disabled Products:"}], "data-id": "disabled-products"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By default, most Retail Express product reports will not include Disabled products."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "You can choose to include Disabled products in the report simply by ticking the "Show Disabled Products" check box at the top of the search filters"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you have chosen the search options you'd like to search on, press the "Search" button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Results"}], "data-id": "results"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi7bEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi7bEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "f1e1a4b946841bbd3b1936fdbc1c29da10394513551f3bfee3ec7b8f87d52bcc.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As explained above, the results show a line per product which includes basic product information, along with an attribute matrix for stock, and an attribute matrix for value, each showing all of the different size/colour combinations that you selected."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
